title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is presented as a desktop-based evolution of Claude Chat that removes file upload limits, increases context window capacity, and outputs ready-to-use files directly to the user's computer rather than chat responses. Key differences include unrestricted local file access versus cloud-based 20-file/30MB limits in Chat mode.
